name: Oriel Resources Plc
description: Oriel Resources Plc was a London-based mining and exploration company primarily focused on the development of chrome and nickel assets in Kazakhstan. The company aimed to supply the stainless steel markets in Asia and Europe by bringing high-value alloying commodity deposits into production. Headquartered in London, Oriel Resources was established to capitalize on rising metal prices through strategic mining operations. The company was eventually acquired by Mechel OAO in 2008, marking a significant consolidation in the international mining sector as it integrated its Kazakhstani mining projects into the larger industrial group's portfolio.
